---
title: "Pig Teeth"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-04"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
# Questions I will be answering in this program:
# 1. Does vitamin C help in tooth growth in guinea pigs?
# 2. Which method of vitamin C intake is better, ascorbic acid or orange juice?
